visual_description_ja: 海上から見た端島の遠景。灰色の波。霧の中に浮かぶコンクリートの島のシルエット
visual_description_en: Wide shot of Hashima Island from the sea. Grey waves. Silhouette of concrete island emerging from mist

visual_description_ja: 廃墟の内部。朽ちた階段。崩れた天井から光が差し込む
visual_description_en: Interior of ruin. Decayed staircase. Light filtering through collapsed ceiling

visual_description_ja: 波が島の護岸に打ちつける映像。防波堤のコンクリートに砕ける白波
visual_description_en: Waves crashing against the island's seawall. White foam breaking on concrete

visual_description_ja: タイトルカード「端島 / 軍艦島」。暗い背景。白い文字
visual_description_en: Title card: 端島 / 軍艦島 on dark background. White typography

visual_description_ja: 明治時代のモノクロ工業風景。蒸気機関車。製鉄所。煙突から煙が上がる工場
visual_description_en: Meiji era monochrome industrial scene. Steam locomotive. Ironworks. Factory chimneys with smoke
notes: Sepia or B&W treatment. Simulated archive.

visual_description_ja: 地図上で端島の位置を示すアニメーション。長崎港から島へのルートを示す
visual_description_en: Animated map showing location of Hashima Island. Route from Nagasaki Port to island

visual_description_ja: 端島の航空写真または再現CG。島全体のコンクリート構造が俯瞰で見える
visual_description_en: Aerial view or CG reconstruction of Hashima Island. Full concrete structure visible from above
notes: Show scale of concrete structures on tiny island.

visual_description_ja: 30号棟の現在の外観。廃墟化したコンクリート集合住宅。崩れた壁
visual_description_en: Exterior of Building 30 today. Ruined concrete apartment block. Crumbling walls

visual_description_ja: 現代の観光船から見た端島。観光客がカメラを向ける
visual_description_en: Hashima Island from a modern tourist boat. Tourists taking photographs

visual_description_ja: 廃墟内部の詳細。朽ちた家具の断片。剥がれた壁。窓から見える空
visual_description_en: Details inside the ruin. Fragments of decayed furniture. Peeling walls. Sky visible through window

visual_description_ja: 島の地下をイメージした暗い映像。狭い坑道。薄明かり。岩と闇
visual_description_en: Dark imagery suggesting underground mine. Narrow tunnel. Dim light. Rock and darkness
notes: Do not show people in distress. Abstract/atmospheric only.

visual_description_ja: ユネスコ世界遺産プレート（または登録証イメージ）。2015年の登録を示すグラフィック
visual_description_en: UNESCO World Heritage plaque or certificate graphic. Indicates 2015 registration

visual_description_ja: 再び廃墟の全景。沈黙。問いを残す映像
visual_description_en: Wide shot of ruins again. Silence. Lingering question.

visual_description_ja: 1974年のテロップと廃墟映像の重なり
visual_description_en: Year 1974 text overlay on ruin footage

visual_description_ja: 空の船着き場のイメージ。錆びた手すり。静かな海
visual_description_en: Empty dock. Rusted railing. Calm sea.

visual_description_ja: 廃墟内部の個人的遺留品（演出）。机の上の本。廊下の片隅の物
visual_description_en: Personal items left behind (stylized). Books on a desk. Object in corner of corridor.
notes: No specific faces or names. Symbolic.

visual_description_ja: 崩れた天井から差し込む光。廃墟の美しさと喪失
visual_description_en: Light streaming through collapsed ceiling. Beauty and loss of ruins.

visual_description_ja: 台風のイメージ（嵐の海、荒れた波）
visual_description_en: Storm imagery. Rough sea. Strong waves.

visual_description_ja: 廃墟の壁。コンクリートのひび割れ。海水の侵食跡
visual_description_en: Ruin wall. Concrete cracks. Marks of seawater erosion.

visual_description_ja: 非常にゆっくりとした波の映像。廃墟の遠景。空
visual_description_en: Very slow wave footage. Distant ruins. Sky.
notes: Ma beat begins. Very slow movement.

visual_description_ja: 廃墟の壁。消えかけた看板。読めない文字
visual_description_en: Ruin wall. Faded sign. Illegible text.

visual_description_ja: 映像のみ。音楽のみ。波の音。10秒の完全な沈黙区間
visual_description_en: Video only. Music only. Sound of waves. 10 seconds of silence.
notes: MA BEAT: No narration. Pure atmosphere. Critical to japan_template.

visual_description_ja: 観光船が端島に近づいていく映像
visual_description_en: Tourist boat approaching Hashima Island.

visual_description_ja: 端島の全景。海。空。最後のショット
visual_description_en: Full view of Hashima Island. Sea. Sky. Final shot.
notes: End card follows. 2s pause before end card.
